title: Meta Social Post AI Output
description: Structured JSON output expected from the AI Meta social post generation prompt. Used by module 11 (daily) and module 10-intraday (story). Validated before platform-specific formatting is applied.

post_caption.description: Base caption suitable for both Instagram and Facebook feed posts. No platform-specific truncation applied yet. Factual, engaging, third-person. HTML-free.

items.description: A single hashtag including the # prefix.

hashtags.description: Hashtags relevant to the topic and content. Include general topic tags and specific event tags.

image_prompt.description: Prompt or guidance for generating or selecting a relevant background image. Should be safe for image generation APIs. Describes the visual mood, subject, and style.

story_caption.description: Short caption for Instagram/Facebook story format. Under 200 characters. Punchy, headline-style. Null when story output is not requested.

story_background_hint.description: Visual style hint for the story background (e.g. 'dark financial chart overlay', 'clean gradient with market data'). Null when story output is not requested.

cta.description: Optional call-to-action appended to the post caption (e.g. 'Read the full analysis — link in bio.'). Null when no CTA is appropriate.

examples.post_caption: Bitcoin ETF inflows hit a record $500M in a single session as institutional demand accelerates. BTC briefly touched the $50K level before settling at $49,400. Ethereum ETFs also saw their second-best inflow day since approval, signalling broad institutional appetite across the crypto market.
examples.image_prompt: Professional financial chart showing Bitcoin price rally with upward trend line, dark background with orange Bitcoin symbol, clean modern style
examples.story_caption: BTC ETFs record $500M single-day inflows 🚀 Bitcoin touches $50K
examples.story_background_hint: Dark gradient with orange Bitcoin symbol and upward arrow
examples.cta: Full daily crypto briefing — link in bio.
